rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"convention","text":"Async tests in this codebase use vi.useFakeTimers() with vi.fn() for controlling timing in describe/it blocks.","scope":"testing"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Validator chains short-circuit on first failure and no-op on empty input — reuse this pattern in src/validation/compose.ts.","scope":"src/validation/compose.ts"},{"kind":"decision","text":"Track merged branches via a _mergedBranches Set in the retry-queue; expose skipMerged/unskipMerged/isMerged methods rather than mutating queue items.","scope":"src/utils/retry-queue.ts"}]}
